text:
In a forest clearing under a twilight sky, a squirrel collected sunflower seeds every morning. One day, she met Oliver—bright yellow hedgehog visiting from faraway Angry Blades Woods. They became pals.

Oliver taught the squirrel about summer escapades like mushroom hikes and waterfall slides.

The squirrel shared with Oliver about winter snowstorms and icy trees.

Together they cooked acorn porridge under the stars.

They dreamed of summer parties with rabbits and birds.

When spring came, they knew it would be worth it. Together they danced beneath daffodils.

And though they always missed their woods home, they remembered and dreamed.

It wasn't always just seeds. It was friends. It was dreams.
